info.title: Tests Platform API
info.description: Assembly + administration engine for a large testing program.

get.description: Verify dependencies (Postgres, Redis). 503 if any are unreachable.

Dense actual TIF over a theta grid (computed via the canonical metric).

Lets the UI draw a smooth actual curve against the discrete blueprint target.
Simulate an examinee at ``theta`` walking this form (real engine + 2PL).
List the selectable simulated banks (for the pool selector).
Return a simulated bank with params, tags, and synthetic content.

Blueprint.title: Blueprint
Blueprint.description: Full assembly specification for one (or several parallel) forms.

ContentConstraint.title: ContentConstraint
ContentConstraint.description:
A min/max count of items carrying a given tag value.

``tag_type`` is the tag dimension (e.g. ``"KC"``, ``"Bloom"``, ``"TIMSS"``,
``"domain"``); ``tag_value`` is the required value on that dimension. At least
one of ``minimum`` / ``maximum`` must be set.

EnemyPolicy.title: EnemyPolicy
EnemyPolicy.description:
How to honor ``enemy_of`` relations from the bank.

When ``enforce`` is true, two items that are enemies of each other may not both
appear in the same form (declared one-directionally in the bank; the compiler
symmetrizes).

ExposureTarget.title: ExposureTarget
ExposureTarget.description:
Optional cap on how often an item may be used across assembled forms.

Only meaningful when assembling multiple parallel forms in one job.

Navigation.title: Navigation
Navigation.description: Navigation capabilities exposed to the test-taker / Sessions module.

NextAction.title: NextAction
NextAction.description: What the engine should do next: present item(s)/module, or complete.

PoolSummary.title: PoolSummary
PoolSummary.description: One entry in the pool catalog (no item payload) — for the pool selector.

PreviewRespondRequest.title: PreviewRespondRequest
PreviewRespondRequest.description: Record one response against the carried-back session state.

PreviewStartRequest.title: PreviewStartRequest
PreviewStartRequest.description: Start a dry-run from a stored blueprint (assemble now) or a stored form.

PreviewStep.title: PreviewStep
PreviewStep.description:
One step of the walkthrough: the new state + what to do next.

``next_action.navigation`` carries the strategy's capabilities, so no separate
capabilities call is needed.

ScenarioRead.title: ScenarioRead
ScenarioRead.description: A named demo scenario: a pool + blueprint preset exercising one capability.

ScoreResult.title: ScoreResult
ScoreResult.description:
Result of scoring a session on the canonical theta metric.

All theta values are normalized through ``psychometrics/`` (the single source
of truth = the mirt scoring service). Mind the D-scaling mismatch.

SessionState.title: SessionState
SessionState.description:
Opaque-to-the-core administration state for one in-flight session.

The engine core treats this as a black box and only passes it back to the
owning strategy. Concrete strategies refine ``data`` with their own typed
payloads in Phase 1+.

SimulationRead.title: SimulationRead
SimulationRead.description: A genuine simulated examinee session over a form (real engine + 2PL model).

TIFCurve.title: TIFCurve
TIFCurve.description:
Dense actual TIF over a theta grid (server-computed via psychometrics) plus
the discrete blueprint target points — for a smooth actual-vs-target plot.

TIFTarget.title: TIFTarget
TIFTarget.description:
Target test information at a set of theta points.

``method`` selects the assembly objective: ``minimax`` (drive actual TIF to the
target, minimizing the worst-point absolute miss — the default for parallel
forms) or ``maximin`` (maximize information at the worst theta point, using
``target_info`` as a floor). ``tolerance`` is an optional absolute band; when
set, the compiler adds hard ``|actual - target| <= tolerance`` constraints in
addition to the objective.

TerminationDecision.title: TerminationDecision
TerminationDecision.description: Whether the session is complete and why.

TestUpdate.title: TestUpdate
TestUpdate.description: PATCH — only provided fields are applied.
